creator: alster@vinterdalen.se
text:
I hope it could keep some ports from being DEPRECATED, as this patch has switched upstream to actually alive Github one.

Ports I would like to keep:
- games/frozen-bubble (depends on devel/p5-SDL) — a really nice game I played happily 20 years ago! :)
- may be some other (which may also depend on devel/p5-SDL) — no need to go, let stay, as smpeg may be actual now

So my contribution to smpeg is just an effort in quest for saving Frozen Bubble! :)
